text_excerpt: News - Honiton, Sidmouth and Tiverton Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Honiton, Sidmouth and Tiverton Liberal Democrats Meet Richard Household Bills Campaigns News Get in touch Volunteer Donate Join Donate Join Campaigns Rural Broadband Rollout Stop Sewage Dumping Flood defences Save Seaton Hospital Fix NHS Dentistry Community Banking News Newsletter News Richard Foord Local MP writes to NHS Devon with concern over Minor Injuries Units Richard Foord has sent a letter to the interim CEO of NHS Devon seeking assurances over East Devon's community health services. CW by Claire Wright 27 Apr 2026 View Richard Foord Devon MP welcomes “encouraging” meeting with Environment Agency on River Otter pollution The MP for Honiton & Sidmouth has welcomed a move for closer working between an environmental watchdog and a group of citizen scientists, who are regularly testing pollution levels on a local river. CW by Claire Wright 15 Apr 2026 View Richard Foord Devon MP calls for better dementia support Richard Foord MP has backed calls for improved dementia care, after the manager of Dementia Friendly Honiton wrote to him in despair at the lack of support that older people are receiving. CW by Claire Wright 11 Mar 2026 View Richard Foord Devon MP launches online petition against government “utter madness” plans to make it easier to build in flood-hit areas Richard Foord MP has launched an online petition against government proposals to water-down important and established protections against flooding in national planning guidance. CW by Claire Wright 2 Mar 2026 View Richard Foord “Cinderella of UK railway lines”– Devon MP takes aim at plans for house building without rail investment Richard Foord MP has condemned government plans for a blanket “yes” to housing proposals within 15 minutes of “well-connected” railway stations, arguing instead for an “infrastructure-first” approach with investment in the West of England line. CW by Claire Wright 25 Feb 2026 View Richard Foord Devon MP writes to Energy Secretary over threat to nature laws The MP for Honiton & Sidmouth has written to the Energy Secretary to demand that the Government thinks again on weakening laws to protect nature, in pursuit of development. CW by Claire Wright 18 Feb 2026 View Richard Foord “Utter madness” - Devon MP slams Government plans to weaken flood protection A Devon MP has opposed fiercely Government proposals to water-down important and established protections against flooding in national planning guidance. CW by Claire Wright 4 Feb 2026 View Richard Foord Devon MP presses Government over flood defences The MP for Honiton & Sidmouth has urged the Deputy Prime Minister to invest in improved flood defences for local communities, following Storm Chandra, which wreaked havoc across East and Mid Devon yesterday. CW by Claire Wright 28 Jan 2026 View Richard Foord Devon MP asks Health Secretary to scrap plans to hand over billions to “bully” Trump The MP for Honiton & Sidmouth has written to the Health Secretary, to request that he drops plans to pay billions of pounds of taxpayers’ money to American pharmaceutical giants. CW by Claire Wright 14 Jan 2026 View 1 2 3 4 5 … 10 UK Lib Dem news Lib Dems Winning Getting the job done: Our latest wins in Westminster The Liberal Democrats secured a number of wins in Parliament recently - here's a recap of what we've achieved. 2 May 2026 View Guaranteeing GP surgeries on new developments Liberal Democrats are clear: new housing must go hand in hand with new GPs. 14 Apr 2026 View Cost of living Our emergency plan to keep Britain moving Liberal Democrats are calling for an emergency transport package to keep Britain moving, cutting the cost of travel for people – whether by car, train or bus. LD by Liberal Democrats 2 Apr 2026 View 1 2 3 4 4 The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.
